mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS stays elevated relative to recent months, markets price the policy rate peak as persistent and expect tighter financial conditions. That lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days because the front end and term premium reprice upward on continued restraint.
failure_condition: If 20-day Treasury yield changes are not positive in periods with FEDFUNDS above its prior 3-month average, or if the signal's directional accuracy falls below 55% over any rolling 3-year window, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month CPIAUCSL acceleration above the recent inflation trend forces markets to expect more restrictive policy and a higher real-rate path. The 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 20 trading days because inflation compensation and policy expectations reprice immediately.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation rises above its prior 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL acceleration above the stated trigger is followed by flat or declining 20-day Treasury yields in more than 60% of triggered observations, or if yield changes are not statistically different from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE and slowing PAYEMS together indicate labor-market deterioration, which pushes the Fed toward less tightening and lowers long yields. The 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days when unemployment rises while payroll growth weakens.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3pp over 3 months while PAYEMS 3-month average growth falls below its prior 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the joint deterioration trigger is followed by positive 20-day Treasury yield changes in more than 55% of cases, or if either series alone explains the sign as well as the interaction.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp fall in RSAFS signals weaker nominal demand and softer near-term growth, reducing expected real yields and inflation compensation. The 10-year Treasury yield declines over the next 20 trading days after sales growth turns negative versus its recent trend.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS month-over-month growth falls below zero for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive negative RSAFS growth does not precede lower 20-day Treasury yields in at least 55% of triggered episodes, or if the average yield change is not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained declines in INDPRO point to weaker industrial supply and deteriorating cyclical momentum, which lowers expected real activity and Treasury yields. The 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 5 trading days when industrial production drops below its recent average.
failure_condition: Reject if negative monthly or short-window changes in INDPRO are not followed by lower 5-day Treasury yields, or if the sign hit rate is below 52% over any rolling 2-year span.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of elevated HOUST and strong RSAFS indicates resilient housing and consumption demand, keeping growth and inflation expectations firm. The 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 60 trading days because markets sustain a higher expected path for real rates.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises above its 6-month moving average while RSAFS remains above its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-demand condition is followed by falling 60-day Treasury yields in more than 55% of cases, or if the interaction adds no explanatory power beyond either proxy alone.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-hike disinflation phase, a rising UNRATE confirms demand cooling and reduces the need for further policy tightening. The 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days when unemployment rises while FEDFUNDS is already above its recent neutral range.
failure_condition: Reject if, during periods with FEDFUNDS above 2.0%, rising UNRATE does not precede lower 20-day Treasury yields, or if the conditional hit rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: If CPIAUCSL remains high while FEDFUNDS has not yet caught up, markets price a delayed but steeper hiking path and push long yields higher. The 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 60 trading days under this inflation-policy gap.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL is accelerating while FEDFUNDS stays at least 1.0pp below the prior 12-month inflation rate
failure_condition: Reject if the inflation-policy gap does not produce higher 60-day Treasury yields in at least 55% of triggered cases, or if the average 60-day yield change is nonpositive.
